headline: Sector Update: Energy Stocks Higher Early Monday
summary: Energy stocks were higher in early trading Monday, with the State Street Energy Select Sector SPDR E

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Targa Resources, Raises Price Target to $282
summary: Barclays  analyst Theresa Chen   maintains Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $270 to $282.
